purpose: Register and hash the locked holdout membership before any frozen-model outcome is evaluated.
selection_rule: Select the next pre-ranked quality-eligible USDT spot assets not included in the Crypto-20 development universe, using only ingestion/coverage/quality checks and no model outcomes.
next_step_if_ready: Run the frozen Phase 43A candidate exactly once under the locked evaluation protocol.
next_step_if_blocked: Ingest and build features/targets for the next pre-ranked external candidates, then rerun registration before any model evaluation.
